center.name: 格林纳达
center.summary: 格林纳达是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括美洲蛇鹈、铜色腰蜂鸟、Grey-rumped swift等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Grenada flycatcher (Myiarchus nugator) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Grenada and Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.Clements, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Available at: http://datazone.birdlife.org/userfiles/file/Species/Taxonomy/HBW-BirdLife_Checklist_v6_Dec21.zip retrieved August 7, 2022 It is found in Honduras, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, and Panama; in every mainland South American country except Chile, French Guiana, Suriname, and Uruguay; in Trinidad and Tobago; and on Grenada.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Saint Barth, Saint Martin, Anguilla, Antigua and Barbuda, Dominica, Grenada, Guadeloupe, Martinique, Montserrat, Netherlands Antilles, Saint Kitts and Nevis, Saint Lucia, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, the British Virgin Islands, and the [[U.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The tanager is only found in Grenada and Saint Vincent

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pearly-eyed thrasher has a somewhat disjunct distribution throughout the West Indies: it is found in the Bahamas, Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, the Turks and Caicos Islands, the eastern Dominican Republic (as well as Isla Beata), many of the Lesser Antilles (except Barbados and Grenada, where it is extirpated), and Bonaire. Its main habitat is bushes and trees in mountain forests and coffee plantations

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: leucogaster can be found in the southern United States, Mexico, Cuba, and the Caribbean island of Grenada. A fossil species, Anhinga walterbolesi, has been described from the Late Oligocene to Early Miocene of Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Tobago, Trinidad, Venezuela, and possibly Grenada.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/bow/hummingbirds/ |title=Hummingbirds |website=IOC World Bird List |version =v 12.2 |editor-last1=Gill |editor-first1= F
